briefdescription.para: Duration type used by the event thread API.
Callback type for invocations without stop support.
Callback type for invocations that can observe cooperative stop requests.
Protects the worker state.
Wakes the worker loop.
Wakes waiting threads after shutdown.
The immediate event queue.
The delayed event queue.
The worker thread id.
A graceful shutdown was requested.
An immediate shutdown was requested.
The worker thread finished.
A wakeup was requested while waiting.
The stop source for the active callback.
The first callback failure.
Optional callback after shutdown.
Create and start a new event thread.
Create an event thread instance.
Queue one invocation on the event thread.

detaileddescription.para:
If the thread is already stopping or finished, this call is ignored.
fn
The callback to execute.

briefdescription.para: Queue one stoppable invocation on the event thread.

detaileddescription.para:
If the thread is already stopping or finished, this call is ignored.
fn
The callback to execute.

briefdescription.para: Queue one invocation on the event thread after a delay.

detaileddescription.para:
If the thread is already stopping or finished, this call is ignored.
fn
The callback to execute.
delay
The delay before execution.

briefdescription.para: Queue one stoppable invocation on the event thread after a delay.

detaileddescription.para:
If the thread is already stopping or finished, this call is ignored.
fn
The callback to execute.
delay
The delay before execution.

briefdescription.para: Request a graceful shutdown.

detaileddescription.para: Delayed work that is not yet due is cancelled immediately.

briefdescription.para: Request an immediate shutdown.

detaileddescription.para: Queued work that has not started yet is discarded.

briefdescription.para: Wait for the thread to finish.

simplesect.para: true if the thread finished before the timeout expired.

parameterdescription.para: If called from the event thread itself before it finished.
Any stored callback exception after the thread finished.

briefdescription.para: Request graceful shutdown and wait for completion.

simplesect.para: true if the thread finished before the timeout expired.

parameterdescription.para: If called from the event thread itself before it finished.
Any stored callback exception after the thread finished.

briefdescription.para: Test if the worker thread is still running.

simplesect.para: true while the event loop is active.

briefdescription.para: Test if graceful shutdown was requested.
Test if immediate shutdown was requested.
Test if the worker thread finished.

simplesect.para: true if the worker thread ended.

briefdescription.para: Test if the worker thread stored a failure.

simplesect.para: true if one callback threw an exception.

briefdescription.para: Start the detached worker thread.
Run the worker loop.
Process one event loop iteration.

simplesect.para: true if the worker thread should continue running.

briefdescription.para: Handle one invocation event.
Queue one stoppable invocation on the event driver.
Queue one delayed stoppable invocation on the event scheduler.
Wake the worker loop.
Get the next time slice to wait for.

simplesect.para: std::nullopt for an indefinite wait, or the maximum wait duration.

briefdescription.para: Request stop on the currently running callback, if any.
Mark the worker thread as finished and notify waiters.
Rethrow the stored callback exception, if any.
Install a callback that runs after the worker thread finished.

parameterdescription.para: The callback to invoke after shutdown.

briefdescription.para: Create one invocation event payload.
A thread that executes queued invocations via the UI event system.
